title: Rock Hill Interstate Crash Claims Life of Woman
summary: A 37-year-old Rock Hill woman was identified as the victim of a fatal interstate crash in York County.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of highway travel and the tragic consequences of traffic accidents in the local area.

title: Manhunt Underway After Shooting in Crowded Parking Lot
summary: Kings Mountain Police are searching for Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr., accused of firing shots into a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Addresses gun violence and public safety concerns in Kings Mountain, emphasizing the need for swift apprehension.

title: Shooting in Kershaw Sends Man to Hospital
summary: A man was airlifted to a hospital after being shot in Lancaster County. The sheriff's office believes the shooting was not a random act.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about violent crime in Kershaw and the potential for targeted attacks within the community.

title: Police Investigate Fatal Crash in West Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a deadly crash on Yorkmont Road in west Charlotte. Details are still emerging.
charlotte_impact: Highlights traffic safety issues and the ongoing efforts to determine the cause of serious accidents in Charlotte.

title: Pedestrian Hospitalized After Being Hit by Vehicle
summary: A pedestrian was hospitalized after being struck by a vehicle on Albemarle Road at Hollirose Drive Friday night.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes pedestrian safety and the risks associated with traffic intersections in Charlotte neighborhoods.

title: Easter Sunday Forecast: Showers and Thunder
summary: The weather forecast for Easter Sunday predicts widespread showers and a chance of thunderstorms.

title: Pedestrian Fatally Struck in Southeast Charlotte
summary: A pedestrian was killed in an overnight vehicle crash near the 7700 block of Krefeld Drive in southeast Charlotte.

title: Escape the Fate to Preview New Music in Charlotte
summary: Escape the Fate and Lacuna Coil will perform at The Underground on April 26, with Escape the Fate teasing new music.

summary: Charlotte SHOUT! kicks off in Uptown, offering 17 days of art, music, and community events with over 200 attractions.

summary: Zackary Wayne Winchester, an art teacher at Benton Heights Elementary School, is charged with indecent liberties with a minor.

summary: Corey Heim secures his second win of 2026 at the NASCAR truck series race in Rockingham.

summary: Higher fuel costs are limiting food pickups and deliveries across the community for Feeding Charlotte volunteers.

title: Hickory Police Fatally Shoot Man Firing at Cars

charlotte_impact: Addresses a critical incident involving law enforcement and public safety, raising questions about police response and mental health.
